title: turraea heterophylla
intro: Turraea heterophylla, also known as the African Ash tree or the Heterophylla tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Turraea heterophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its effectiveness in treating infections and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Turraea heterophylla plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
